name: hyperia-browser
description: A clean, minimal browser with security checks
author: Xeno-Devteam

scripts.electron-pack: npm run build && cp main.js dist-electron/ && electron-builder
scripts.electron-pack-win: npm run build && cp main.js dist-electron/ && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron-pack-mac: npm run build && cp main.js dist-electron/ && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron-pack-linux: npm run build && cp main.js dist-electron/ && electron-builder --linux
